hero.subtitle: Daily English speaking practice with shadowing, spaced repetition, and the same habit engine that keeps hundred-day streaks alive — no memorized grammar, no subscription.

pillars.shadowingDescription: Practice with content you choose, not generic textbook sentences.
pillars.spacedRepetitionDescription: Reviews at the right moment, before you forget — no hand-made flashcards.
pillars.streakDescription: The same habit engine as Duolingo, now training what actually gets stuck: speaking.

hero.ceoQuote: "I built Fluentra because I got tired of understanding English perfectly and freezing up when I had to speak. If it fixes that for me, it was already worth it."

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start training your English speaking today
register.usernameError: Enter a username (up to 30 characters, no spaces).
register.passwordError: At least 8 characters, with 1 number and 1 special character.
register.passwordHelper: At least 8 characters, with 1 number and 1 special character.
register.success: Account created! Now just log in.

errors.loginUnexpected: Couldn't log in. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.registerUnexpected: Couldn't create the account. Check your details and try again.

shadowing.nextUpDescription: 3 words from this lesson entered your spaced review for today.

search.noResults: No videos found for this search.

errors.searchFailed: Couldn't search for videos right now. Please try again.
errors.invalidUrl: That link doesn't look like a valid YouTube video.
errors.videoNotEligible: This video doesn't have English captions available.
errors.quotaExhausted: Daily search limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
